# Example module

This document is valid Markdown and must not produce any markdownlint findings.
It exercises the constructs the rules care about, all in their correct form.

## Overview

The text uses consistent *emphasis* and **strong** styles throughout, with no
trailing spaces, no hard tabs and no reversed links.

## Configuration

A fenced code block with a language and surrounding blank lines:

```yaml
key: value
```

A table surrounded by blank lines, with a consistent pipe style and a constant
column count:

| Name | Type   |
| ---- | ------ |
| foo  | string |
| bar  | int    |

A reference link to a [defined label][example] and a proper inline
[link](https://example.com/) with descriptive text.

[example]: https://example.com/
